query:
SELECT id, userId, participantId, type, title, pushStatus, pushAttempts, LEFT(COALESCE(lastPushError, ''), 200) AS lastPushError, readAt, createdAt, updatedAt
FROM participant_notifications
WHERE participantId = 60011
  AND (DATE(createdAt) BETWEEN '2026-05-09' AND '2026-05-10' OR DATE(updatedAt) BETWEEN '2026-05-09' AND '2026-05-10')
ORDER BY createdAt DESC, id DESC
LIMIT 20;
